title: Funding Round
description: Schema for venture capital and private equity funding round records.

company_name.description: Name of the company that raised funding. Commonly found in: press release headline, Crunchbase company name, news article title.

company_domain.description: Website domain of the funded company. Commonly found in: company website link, press release footer, Crunchbase profile.

round_type.description: Type of funding round. Commonly found in: round type field, Crunchbase round stage, press release headline.

amount_usd.description: Amount raised in this round in USD. Commonly found in: press release headline amount, Crunchbase amount field, news article.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code of the raise. Commonly found in: press release amount, funding details section.

announced_date.description: Date the funding round was publicly announced. Commonly found in: press release date, article publish date, Crunchbase announced on field.

closed_date.description: Date the funding round officially closed. Commonly found in: SEC filing closed date, Crunchbase closed on field, press release details.

lead_investor.description: Name of the lead investor. Commonly found in: press release investor mention, Crunchbase lead investor, news article.

co_investors.description: List of participating co-investors. Commonly found in: investor list in press release, Crunchbase investor list, news article investor section.

total_raised_usd.description: Total funding raised to date in USD. Commonly found in: Crunchbase total funding, press release total raised stat, company profile.

post_money_valuation_usd.description: Post-money valuation in USD. Commonly found in: press release valuation mention, news article valuation, SEC filing.

pre_money_valuation_usd.description: Pre-money valuation in USD. Commonly found in: SEC filing, analyst report, deal terms disclosure.

investor_count.description: Total number of investors participating in this round. Commonly found in: Crunchbase investor count, press release investor list count.

use_of_funds.description: Stated intended use of the raised funds. Commonly found in: press release body, CEO quote, news article use of funds section.

company_hq_city.description: City of the company's headquarters. Commonly found in: company profile location, press release company info, Crunchbase HQ.

company_hq_country.description: Country of the company's headquarters. Commonly found in: company profile location, press release company info, Crunchbase HQ.

company_industry.description: Industry of the funded company. Commonly found in: Crunchbase categories, press release company description, news article sector tag.

source_type.description: Type of source (e.g., press_release, crunchbase, news_article). Commonly found in: site domain classification, content type, source format.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
